action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval score is 0.519 from iter_6. The model has plateaued at val_r2=0.5799 internally. With only 0.56h remaining (~34 min), I have very limited time. The last eval submission (iter_11) got 0.5172, slightly below the best of 0.519. Analysis: The best checkpoint is still from iter_5/6 with mean_r2=0.519. I should submit eval with the best checkpoint to lock in the best score. Decision: Submit eval with the best checkpoint.
